title: Rename bud to build
body:
This is more of a suggestion that the issue, of course. 

`bud` is `build-using-dockerfile`. This command will also understand 'Containerfile', which is not Docker-oriented, at least from the name. Renaming `bud` to just `build` will remove this kind of discrepancy. And once Containerfile is a real thing, and not just a convention, then `build` will make ever more sense, than `bud`.

comments.body: Interested in opening a PR to make bud == build, so either would work.  I don't see us removing bud, since it is well known and would break backwards compatibility.
Yes, I agree, for backwards compatibility bud needs to stay for a while.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
